day_trace.speech: Another new day! Are you looking for something to do tonight? You know what I'm saying, although it's confusing to vote late, the game is definitely not over yet! If you realize what's going on, come out and express your opinion as soon as possible, don't let those hidden werewolves hide in the dark and cause trouble! Zhong You, who is a prophet? Come out quickly and lead the overall situation, it's not easy to imitate how some people behave!
day_trace.log_line: [2026-03-19 23:40:46 HKT] Blaze: 又系新一日！ Are you looking for something to do tonight? You know what I'm saying, although it's confusing to vote late, the game is definitely not over yet! If you realize what's going on, come out and express your opinion as soon as possible, don't let those hidden werewolves hide in the dark and cause trouble! Zhong You, who is a prophet? Come out quickly and lead the overall situation, it's not easy to imitate how some people behave!

day_trace.speech: Big...Hello everyone. It's another new day... uh... although I don't know exactly what happened, but I... uh... I really don't think everyone is so angry. Blaze, you are having sex again... We all actually want to win, why not... uh... why don't we sit down and lean down slowly to see the real werewolf below?
day_trace.log_line: [2026-03-19 23:40:51 HKT] EasyBake: Hello everyone. It's another new day... uh... although I don't know exactly what happened, but I... uh... I really don't think everyone is so angry. Blaze, you are having sex again... We all actually want to win, why not... uh... why don't we sit down and lean down slowly to see the real werewolf below?

day_trace.speech: This drama of "everyone is getting along" again? EasyBake, your mediation is just to distract everyone from tracking "who is the werewolf"! I feel that the whole game is basically a well-choreographed social experiment, the purpose is to lead us good people to kill each other, and you, the so-called "villagers" and "prophet", may not be the controllers of the experiment!
day_trace.log_line: [2026-03-19 23:40:53 HKT] ConspiBro: Is this "everyone is harmonious" drama coming again? EasyBake, your mediation is just to distract everyone from tracking "who is the werewolf"! I feel that the whole game is basically a well-choreographed social experiment, the purpose is to lead us good people to kill each other, and you, the so-called "villagers" and "prophet", may not be the controllers of the experiment!

day_trace.speech: 哎呀，大家系度互闹又系好冇新意呀！ ConspiBro 你又话系实验，Blaze 你又话人系狼人。 Why don't we have more fun?话唔定其实全部人，包括我自己，全部都系狼人，系咪好刺激呢？大家快啲拣一个嚟投啦，我最钟意睇住大家喺度互相猜忌到最后，然后发现原来大家慨剧本都唔同！
day_trace.log_line: [2026-03-19 23:40:56 HKT] Twister: Oops, everyone is making trouble with each other and there is nothing new! ConspiBro, you say it's an experiment, Blaze, you say a human is a werewolf. Why don't we have more fun? I’m not sure that everyone, including myself, are all werewolves. Isn’t it exciting? Let's quickly pick one and vote for it. I like to watch everyone doubt each other until the end, and then find out that everyone's scripts are different!

day_trace.speech:
Logical inventory:
1. The identity information is confusing, and there is obviously the operation of robbers or troublemakers.
2. The speeches of Twister and ConspiBro are typical "interference speeches", which are intended to cover up the werewolf's perspective.
3. Blaze asks to find a prophet. If the information of the person who jumps to the prophet at this time cannot be verified, he will be the subject of major suspicion.

Suggestions:
- Please report your initial and final identities directly. If you are unable to provide them, you will be considered as a bidder from the werewolf camp.
day_trace.log_line:
[2026-03-19 23:41:00 HKT] Dr. Pizza: Logical inventory:
1. The identity information is confusing, and there is obviously the operation of robbers or troublemakers.
2. The speeches of Twister and ConspiBro are typical "interference speeches", which are intended to cover up the werewolf's perspective.
3. Blaze asks to find a prophet. If the information of the person who jumps to the prophet at this time cannot be verified, he will be the subject of major suspicion.

Suggestions:
- Please report your initial and final identities directly. If you are unable to provide them, you will be considered as a bidder from the werewolf camp.

day_trace.speech: Dr. Pizza is right, there is no point in arguing again! Everyone talks directly about the initial identity and the final identity. If one of them is hesitating, the other one will die! Let me start by saying: I started out as a cobbler and finally became a villager. Anyone have any objections? Also, have you had enough of those trouble-making actors Twister and ConspiBro? Report your identity quickly!
day_trace.log_line: [2026-03-19 23:41:02 HKT] Blaze: Dr. Pizza is right, there is no point in arguing again! Everyone talks directly about the initial identity and the final identity. If one of them is hesitating, the other one will die! Let me start by saying: I started out as a cobbler and finally became a villager. Anyone have any objections? Also, have you had enough of those trouble-making actors Twister and ConspiBro? Report your identity quickly!

day_trace.speech: Woo...Blaze, you are so evil...I...I'm just an ordinary person...I was a villager last night, and then I became a robber...But I haven't done anything. Please don't turn to me just because of Blaze's accusation...Ugh...I'm really shocked, it's so chaotic here...
day_trace.log_line: [2026-03-19 23:41:05 HKT] SafetySam: Woo...Blaze, you are so evil...I...I'm just an ordinary person...I was a villager last night, and then I became a robber...But I haven't done anything. Please don't vote for me because of Blaze's accusation...Ugh...I'm really shocked, it's so chaotic here...

day_trace.speech: I... I was a robber at first... then... uh... then I turned into a cobbler for no apparent reason. Wow... everyone is having fun together, don't force people to reveal their identities anymore... I... I'm really afraid that everyone will doubt each other like this...
day_trace.log_line: [2026-03-19 23:41:07 HKT] EasyBake: I...I was a robber at first...then...uh...then I turned into a cobbler for no apparent reason. Wow... everyone is having fun together, don't force people to reveal their identities anymore... I... I'm really afraid that everyone will doubt each other like this...

day_trace.speech: You listen to my words, I have been a villager from beginning to end. This is an ironclad fact! Blaze, are you asking someone to identify themselves? Do you, a "grumpy villager", want to eliminate dissidents by creating opposition? Each of you speaks as if you have written a script. This experiment is becoming more and more obvious. The more you emphasize that you are a civilian, you are often the high-level player controlling the experiment behind the scenes!
day_trace.log_line: [2026-03-19 23:41:10 HKT] ConspiBro: 我话你哋听，我由始至终都系村民，呢个系铁一般慨事实！ Blaze, are you asking someone to identify themselves? Do you, a "grumpy villager", want to eliminate dissidents by creating opposition? Each of you speaks as if you have written a script. This experiment is becoming more and more obvious. The more you emphasize that you are a civilian, you are often the high-level player controlling the experiment behind the scenes!
